title: Create Astra
description: Travel to various structures, find rare loot and build the biggest factory on the moon!
body:
### Travel to various structures, find rare loot and build the biggest factory on the moon!

**This modpack is based on the Create and Ad Astra mod, but also adds many structures and items to explore!**

**This is made possible with mods like Artifacts, Dungeons and Taverns, Terralith and more**
